scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The audited sparse-board foundation adds BoardTopology and BoardTopologyTemplate as two project runtime class_name scripts, changing the project runtime class count from 133 to 135. With the same pinned GF 8.1.0 vendor tree and Godot 4.7.1, a directory-scanned 212-test control run without the new topology test retained ObjectDB=277 and Resources=128; the complete 219-test suite retained ObjectDB=279 and Resources=128. RID allocations remain unchanged at TextureStorage=8, ShapedText=2, and Font=3, so the increase is limited to the reviewed runtime class/resource set and GUT test collection.
